changelog: v4.1.1: Tweak safety pass. BCDEdit: tscsyncpolicy is now CCD-aware (only multi-CCD AMD needs Enhanced; single-CCD measures 1.9% better DPC without it), auto-removes the MSConfig numproc myth and debug-only BCD flags left by other tweak guides (testsigning, bootdebug, sos, pcilock, halbreakpoint, disableelamdrivers, bootlog). Basic Gaming Tweaks: HAGS now default-on for Win11 24H2+ (+4-5 FPS on 1% lows measured), auditpol /clear gated behind an explicit -WipeAuditPolicy flag, Modern Standby disabled on desktops so Ultimate/High Performance power plans unlock, dropped confirmed no-ops (MMCSS Clock Rate, LargeSystemCache, CFG disable). Network Tweaks: on Win11 25H2 RSS queues now land past CPU 0-3 on clean cores for -15% peak DPC on 9800X3D, Competitive preset bumped to 4 queues on 8-core+ systems, suppresses "indirection table empty" warning on single-queue NICs. CacheLimited bottleneck path no longer tells X3D users to upgrade to X3D; CPU and Memory pages point to BCLK2/ring OC and RAM tuning, home pipeline L3 tile goes amber with "96 MB - pacing ceiling". PowerShell script console enlarged to 1200x720 with a 120-col, 3000-line buffer. ChangeLog display dedupes identical tweak re-runs (underlying history and per-entry revert unchanged). All em/en dashes replaced with regular hyphens across user-facing text.
